parameters.apprise_url_plus: gchat://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.workspace_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.webhook_key_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.webhook_token_secret }} }
parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Google Chat destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise gchat:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters.

webhook_key_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Google Chat webhook key

webhook_token_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Google Chat webhook token

workspace_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Google Chat workspace
